title: Epitaph On A Certain Physiognomist.
content:
On every nose he rightly read
    What intellects were in the head
    And yet that he was not the one
    By whom God meant it to be done,
    This on his own he never read.
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epitaph On A Certain Physiognomist."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
